name: openai_image
description: Generate images using OpenAI's gpt-image model. Quality-first defaults (1024x1024, high quality). Returns a task_id that completes asynchronously.

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate. Be specific about subjects, style, composition, lighting, colors, and mood.

quality.description: Rendering quality: 'low', 'medium', or 'high'. Higher = more detail but slower/costlier. Default: 'high'

numberOfImages.description: Number of images to generate (1-4). Default: 1

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
example: openai_image(prompt="a watercolor fox in a forest", size="1024x1024", quality="high")
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress.
